events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — Matthew Stafford won't get knighted for his record-setting performance at Wembley Stadium, but he wondered if he still gets a prize.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford throws 5 TD passes as Rams rout Jaguars 35-7 at rainy Wembley

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — As much as Dennis Allen downplayed going against his former team, his players weren't buying it. This one had to mean a little more.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen's defense dominates against former team as Bears beat Saints 26-14 for 4th straight win

headlines.description: — Grant Delpit said leading up to Cleveland's game against Miami that he forgot what it was like to be a part of a win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quinshon Judkins scores 3 touchdowns as Browns roll to 31-6 victory over Dolphins

events.name: New England Patriots at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — Mike Vrabel greeted his New England Patriots with a celebratory hug just as he did with the Tennessee Titans not far away in Nissan Stadium and not too long ago.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patriots rout the Titans 31-13 in coach Mike Vrabel's return to Tennessee

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Chiefs so thoroughly dominated the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday that they probably didn't need Rashee Rice, who had come back from a torn ACL and a six-game suspension to give them yet another dynamic weapon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes leads Chiefs to 31-0 rout of Raiders as Rashee Rice returns with 2 TDs

headlines.description: — Though many of the elements that made the Philadelphia Eagles champions last season had been missing during this unsettling start, their confidence in themselves never lacked.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts jump-starts the Eagles by passing for 326 yards and 3 TDs in a 28-22 win vs. Vikings

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New York Jets

headlines.description: — The Carolina Panthers have a three-game winning streak for the first time with Bryce Young as their starting quarterback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panthers beat Jets 13-6 for third straight win, but Bryce Young leaves with injured ankle

events.name: New York Giants at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Once the bungling, bumbling Denver Broncos finally got going, they couldn't be stopped.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos stun Giants 33-32 with last-second field goal in historic comeback

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — The Indianapolis Colts finally got a win in Los Angeles, where coach Shane Steichen paid his dues before now directing the NFL's best scoring offense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor scores 3 touchdowns and Colts beat Chargers 38-24 for NFL-leading 6th victory

headlines.description: — CeeDee Lamb ran sideways, arms in the air with the ball in one hand while finishing off a 74-yard touchdown catch with new sidekick George Pickens backpedaling into the end zone at the same time from just a few yards away.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamb has a 74-yard TD catch and Bland gets a pick-6 as Cowboys beat Commanders 44-22

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Arizona Cardinals

headlines.description: — The majority of this road trip didn't go well for the Green Bay Packers, who waited on a tarmac several hours because of travel delays on Saturday before falling into a 10-point hole in the first half on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Jacobs runs for 2 TDs, Micah Parsons has 3 sacks as Packers rally past Cardinals 27-23

headlines.description: — For all the stars the San Francisco 49ers might have been missing, they still had Christian McCaffrey.
headlines.shortLinkText: Christian McCaffrey's 200-yard game from scrimmage powers 49ers past Falcons 20-10
